title: Effects of Mobile Mindfulness Meditation on the Mental Health of University Students: Systematic Review and Meta-analysis
headline: Effects of Mobile Mindfulness Meditation on the Mental Health of University Students: Systematic Review and Me
summary: A meta-analysis / systematic review of mindfulness / meditation examined brief & app-based practice. The evidence level of the results from the 10 studies was determined to be moderate to low.
keyFindings: The evidence level of the results from the 10 studies was determined to be moderate to low.
limitations: The methodological quality of the selected studies was determined using the Cochrane criteria for risk-of-bias assessment.
Sensitivity analyses and subgroup analyses were performed for results with high heterogeneity.
The use of either waitlist control or traditional face-to-face intervention in the control group was identified as the source of heterogeneity.
Pooled estimates combine heterogeneous studies; effect sizes vary by practice, population, and control condition.
simplifiedTitle: Effects of Mobile Mindfulness Meditation on the Mental Health of University Students: Systematic Review and Me
aiSnippet: Meta-analysis / Systematic review, Journal of medical Internet research (2023). The evidence level of the results from the 10 studies was determined to be moderate to low.
